title: How to Set Up Bank Transfer / Pay at Property
summary: How to set up bank transfer or pay at property so guests can pay manually before or on arrival.
content:
Bank Transfer (Pay at Property) allows guests to pay by bank transfer before arrival or pay cash/card on arrival. No online payment is taken at booking — the guest simply reserves and pays later.

STEP 1 — Enable Pay at Property
1. In GAS Admin, go to Bookings & Revenue
2. Click Payments
3. Find 'Pay at Property' and tick the checkbox to enable it
4. You can customise the button label shown to guests (e.g. 'Reserve Now & Pay on Arrival', 'Pay by Bank Transfer')
5. Add a description shown at checkout (e.g. 'Pay when you arrive - no payment needed now')
6. Click Save

STEP 2 — Add your bank details (optional)
If you want guests to pay by bank transfer before arrival, add your bank details to the description field so guests know where to send payment:
- Bank name
- Account name
- IBAN or account number
- SWIFT/BIC code
- Reference instructions (e.g. use booking reference number)

Example description:
'Please transfer payment to: [Your Bank Name], Account: [Your Name], IBAN: [Your IBAN]. Use your booking reference as payment reference. Payment must be received 48 hours before arrival.'

STEP 3 — Test your setup
Make a test booking on your site and verify the Pay at Property option appears at checkout.

Important notes:
- Guests who choose this option will receive a booking confirmation but no payment is taken
- You are responsible for chasing payment if needed
- You can enable both Stripe and Pay at Property — guests choose at checkout
- For cancellation protection, consider also enabling Card Guarantee

Need help? Contact the GAS team at hello@gas.travel

title: How to Manage Your Account Settings
summary: How to update your business profile, change your password and configure your account settings in GAS.
content:
Your account settings control your business profile and how GAS is configured for your properties.

STEP 1 — Access your account settings
1. In GAS Admin, click My Account in the dashboard
2. Or click your account name in the top left corner

STEP 2 — Update your business profile
You can update:
- Business / Company name
- Your full name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Business address
- Website URL

Click Save after making any changes.

STEP 3 — Change your password
1. In My Account, find the Password section
2. Enter your current password
3. Enter your new password
4. Confirm your new password
5. Click Save

If you have forgotten your password, log out and use the Forgot Password link on the login page.

STEP 4 — Language settings
GAS supports multiple languages for your booking pages and website:
1. In My Account or Language Settings, select which languages you want to enable
2. Available languages: English (EN), French (FR), German (DE), Spanish (ES), Dutch (NL), Japanese (JA)
3. Your primary language is the default shown to guests
4. Additional languages can be added for multilingual sites

Once languages are enabled, you can add translations for room names, descriptions, upsells, offers and other content using the language tabs that appear on each field.

STEP 5 — Currency
Your property currency is set per property in Property Management. Make sure it matches the currency you use in your Channel Manager.

Need help? Contact the GAS team at hello@gas.travel

title: How to Set Up Card Guarantee
summary: How to enable Card Guarantee so guests provide card details as a booking guarantee without being charged.
content:
Card Guarantee allows you to securely capture a guest's card details at booking as a guarantee — no charge is made at booking time. This protects you against no-shows and late cancellations.

Card Guarantee in GAS is powered by Enigma, a PCI-secure card vault.

STEP 1 — Enable Card Guarantee
1. In GAS Admin, go to Bookings & Revenue
2. Click Payments
3. Find 'Card Guarantee' and tick the checkbox to enable it
4. Click Save

STEP 2 — How it works for guests
- Guest makes a booking on your site
- At checkout they are asked to enter their card details securely
- No charge is made — the card is stored as a guarantee only
- You can charge the card manually if needed (e.g. for a no-show or damage)
- Guest receives booking confirmation

STEP 3 — Charging a guaranteed card
If you need to charge a guest's guaranteed card:
1. Go to Bookings & Revenue → Bookings
2. Find the booking
3. Use the charge option to apply a fee
4. Enter the amount and reason

Important notes:
- Card Guarantee is separate from Stripe — they are independent systems
- You can enable Card Guarantee alongside Stripe or Pay at Property
- All card data is stored securely by Enigma — GAS never stores raw card numbers
- Guests are informed their card is taken as guarantee only, not charged

Need help? Contact the GAS team at hello@gas.travel
